title: Fourth assistant district attorney
doc_html:
§462.  Fourth assistant district attorney

The office of fourth assistant district attorney is hereby created for the Twenty-First Judicial District.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 574, §2.
doc_text:
§462.  Fourth assistant district attorney
The office of fourth assistant district attorney is hereby created for the Twenty-First Judicial District.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 574, §2.
